posts.author: montybindra
posts.text: FY26 results Concall Order book: Strategic Agreements of 3000Cr over and above the confirmed PO of 715Cr Confirmed POs of 715Cr Recv Orders worth 590CR this year. Guidance: Same 80-90% rate of growth as we did last year Margins b/w 17-22% for FY27 Rev Split 50% aerospace & 50% Defence/Semicon/Space Expects some RFPs from Commercial Aircraft by Q2 of this FY. Did 500Cr rev this year, can do 800Cr in FY27 General: Will be ramping up for T-7 Boeing delivery program in Q2 this year. Have a 200M strategic agreement for this with Boeing Reasons for low Margins: making a lot of investments in infrast…
